# Google News SEO Toolkit

> Free tools and guides for news publishers to optimize articles for Google News, Google Discover, and AI search engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude).

## Product Overview

Google News SEO Toolkit is a free web application that analyzes article URLs for Google News eligibility, NewsArticle schema validity, Google Discover readiness, and AI citation potential. Built for publishers, journalists, SEO teams, and newsrooms.

## Features

- Real-time article analysis (under 20 seconds per URL)
- Google News eligibility scoring and validation
- NewsArticle JSON-LD schema detection and validation
- Google Discover optimization scoring
- AI citation readiness scoring for ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity
- Technical SEO audit (indexability, canonical, crawl health)
- Actionable fix recommendations prioritized by impact
- News sitemap validation
- Organization and publisher trust signal analysis
- E-E-A-T and entity coverage assessment

## Free Tools

- [Google News Validator](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/google-news-validator) - Check NewsArticle schema, author, publisher, canonical, and Google News eligibility.
- [NewsArticle Schema Generator](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/news-schema-generator) - Generate valid NewsArticle JSON-LD structured data for any article.
- [News Sitemap Validator](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/news-sitemap-validator) - Validate Google News sitemap XML structure and freshness.
- [Google Discover Checker](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/google-discover-checker) - Check image quality, E-E-A-T, Core Web Vitals for Discover eligibility.
- [AI Citation Checker](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/ai-citation-checker) - Check if articles are optimized for ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity citation.
- [ChatGPT Citation Checker](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/chatgpt-citation-checker) - Verify OAI-SearchBot access and ChatGPT Search readiness.
- [Perplexity Citation Checker](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/tools/perplexity-citation-checker) - Audit content quality for Perplexity source selection and references.
- [News SEO Checker](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/news-seo-checker) - Analyze title, meta, headings, and on-page SEO for news articles.
- [Google News Score](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/google-news-score) - Calculate overall Google News readiness score (0-100).
- [AI Search Score](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/tools/ai-search-score) - Score AI search optimization factors across citation-focused systems.

## Guides

- [Google News Requirements](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/blog/google-news-requirements) - Complete checklist for Google News compliance.
- [How to Get Indexed in Google News](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/blog/how-to-get-indexed-in-google-news) - Step-by-step guide for publishers.
- [NewsArticle Schema Guide](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/blog/news-schema-guide) - Complete JSON-LD implementation guide.
- [Google Discover Guide](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/blog/google-discover-guide) - How to get articles in the Discovery feed.
- [AI Search Optimization Guide](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/blog/ai-search-optimization-guide) - GEO guide for ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.
- [ChatGPT SEO Guide](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/blog/chatgpt-seo-guide) - Get cited by ChatGPT Search.
- [Google News Sitemap Guide](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/blog/google-news-sitemap-guide) - News sitemap setup and troubleshooting.
- [News Publisher SEO Guide](https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/blog/news-publisher-seo-guide) - Complete publisher SEO strategy for 2025.

## Pricing

Free forever. 5 article analyses per day with no signup required. Quota resets every 24 hours.

## Contact

- Website: https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app
- Newsletter: https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/#newsletter
- RSS Feed: https://seo-toolkit-platform.vercel.app/rss.xml

## Technical Details

Built with Next.js 15 App Router, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, and deployed on Vercel. Analyzes meta tags, structured data, sitemaps, and validates against Google News and schema.org specifications.

## About

Google News SEO Toolkit is a free market validation product for news publishers, journalists, SEO teams, newsrooms, and media companies. Not affiliated with Google LLC.

## FAQ

- **How many audits can I perform?** Free users can perform 5 audits per day. The limit resets every 24 hours.
- **Do I need to create an account?** No, the tool is completely free to use without registration.
- **What does the tool check?** We analyze technical SEO elements, Google News compliance, schema markup, sitemaps, and AI search readiness.
- **How accurate are the recommendations?** Our recommendations are based on official Google guidelines and schema.org specifications.
- **Can I audit any website?** Yes, you can audit any publicly accessible website.
- **How long does an audit take?** Most audits complete in less than 10 seconds.
